items.name: Solana Ecosystem Intelligence Feed
items.description: Oráculo de sinais de mercado A2A. Consome feeds públicos da Fundação Solana, Jupiter, Kamino, Meteora, etc., validados por IA e deduplicados. Não contém claims absolutos sem prova.

items.name: chitu
items.description: Sistema de captura de Alpha on-chain na Solana para comunidades e equipes de pesquisa (3º Colocado no Solana Online Hackathon). O agente monitora os movimentos do smart money e notifica sobre oportunidades de trade em tempo real.

items.name: colosseum-copilot
items.description: Pesquisa oportunidades e teses em Solana/crypto com base em historico de builders e sinais publicos.

items.name: DeFi Execution Router
items.description: Skill de Cloud/On-chain computing para execução atômica. Roteia transações DeFi (swaps, staking, yield) minimizando slippage e evitando MEV sanduiche.

items.name: hermes-canvas-architect
items.description: Skill meta-cognitiva para geração modular de Pitchdecks (10+ slides). Estrutura automática de TAM, SAM, SOM, PMF e GTM em código React (TSX) com VSC Economy (Zero Emojis).

items.name: kuka
items.description: Mentor Solana com analogias TradFi e didatica direta (termos, quiz, learning path, walkthrough).

items.name: neural-memory
items.description: Gerencia operações append-only, compressão semântica e retrieval contextual para evitar context bloat.

items.name: On-Chain Data Profiler
items.description: Skill de Data Analysis e Indexação on-chain. Analisa carteiras, fluxos UTXO e extrai métricas comportamentais (TVL, win rate) para qualificação de risco de crédito.

items.name: peak-trading
items.description: Terminal de IA quantitativa para registro de operações e gestão de risco (1º Colocado no Solana Online Hackathon). O agente analisa livros de ofertas e executa estratégias quantitativas com gestão de risco automatizada via machine learning.

items.name: render-validation-expert
items.description: Auditoria visual e correcoes de bugs de renderizacao no localhost (Vite/React e Next.js).

items.name: Smart Contract Security Auditor
items.description: Skill de Cybersecurity e Zero-Trust. Inspeciona binários Rust/Solana (e código-fonte) em busca de vulnerabilidades conhecidas (reentrancy, overflow, missing signer checks).

items.name: solana-defi-ecosystem-intel
items.description: Coleta e estrutura sinais publicos do ecossistema Solana DeFi usando Firecrawl, com taxonomias e regras anti-alucinacao.

items.name: unicorn-vps
items.description: Bootstrap seguro e educativo de VPS Ubuntu via Claude Code para ecossistema One Person Unicorn / Startup Factory.

items.name: x402-flow-auditor
items.description: Audita e valida o fluxo de onboarding de builders e liquidacao atomica x402 no MIND Protocol, garantindo seguranca Zero-Trust e UX fluida.

items.name: Zero-Trust Release Ops
items.description: Automatiza a criação de repositórios 'Clean Room' (SPV) em branches órfãs. Isola o ativo final do passivo histórico (commits, credenciais vazadas) para auditoria pública.

items.name: arcium
items.description: Encrypted computation via MPC — dark pools, sealed-bid auctions, encrypted voting, confidential DeFi

items.name: code-recon
items.description: Deep architectural context building for security audits

items.name: coingecko
items.description: Token prices, DEX pool data, OHLCV charts, trades

items.name: debridge
items.description: Cross-chain bridges, message passing, Solana ↔ EVM transfers

items.name: dflow
items.description: Spot trading, prediction markets, Swap API, WebSocket streaming

items.name: glam
items.description: Tokenized vaults, DeFi integrations (Jupiter, Kamino), staking, asset management

items.name: helius
items.description: RPC, DAS API, webhooks, priority fees, LaserStream gRPC

items.name: jupiter
items.description: Ultra swaps, limit orders, DCA, perpetuals, lending, and token APIs

items.name: kamino
items.description: Lending, borrowing, liquidity management, leverage trading

items.name: light-protocol
items.description: ZK Compression, rent-free compressed tokens

items.name: lulo
items.description: Lending aggregator across Kamino, Drift, MarginFi, Jupiter

items.name: magicblock
items.description: Ephemeral Rollups, sub-10ms latency, gasless transactions

items.name: manifest
items.description: CLOB, limit orders, reverse orders, global orders, Destiny vaults

items.name: marginfi
items.description: Lending, borrowing, leveraged positions (looping) and flash loans

items.name: metaplex
items.description: Core, Token Metadata, Bubblegum, Candy Machine, Umi framework

items.name: metengine
items.description: Smart money analytics (wallet scoring, insider detection, capital flow tracking), x402 pay-per-request

items.name: meteora
items.description: DLMM, DAMM pools, bonding curves, Alpha Vaults

items.name: orca
items.description: Whirlpools concentrated liquidity AMM, swaps, positions

items.name: pinocchio-development
items.description: Zero-copy framework for high-performance programs (88-95% CU reduction)

items.name: pumpfun
items.description: Token launches, bonding curves, PumpSwap AMM

items.name: pyth
items.description: Real-time price feeds, confidence intervals, EMA prices

items.name: quicknode
items.description: RPC (80+ chains), DAS API, Yellowstone gRPC, Streams, webhooks, priority fees, Metis Jupiter

items.name: ranger-finance
items.description: Perps aggregator across Drift, Flash, Adrena, Jupiter

items.name: raydium
items.description: AMM pools, CLMM, CPMM, LaunchLab token launches

items.name: sanctum
items.description: Liquid staking, LST swaps, Infinity pool

items.name: sol-incinerator
items.description: Burn tokens, burn NFTs, close token accounts

items.name: solana-agent-kit
items.description: 60+ Solana operations with LangChain, Vercel AI, MCP support

items.name: solana-kit
items.description: Modern tree-shakeable SDK from Anza, zero dependencies

items.name: solana-kit-migration
items.description: Migration guide from @solana/web3.js v1.x to @solana/kit

items.name: squads
items.description: Multisig wallets, smart accounts, account abstraction

items.name: surfpool
items.description: Development environment with mainnet forking, cheatcodes

items.name: switchboard
items.description: Price feeds, on-demand data, VRF randomness, Surge streaming

items.name: vulnhunter
items.description: Vulnerability detection, dangerous API hunting, variant analysis

items.name: clint
items.description: CLINT — CNB Link Intelligence. DePIN proof verifier for the CNB Mobile network on Solana. Ingests on-chain Memo transactions and Anchor PDA data to compute a Node Health Index (NHI, 0–100) with Sybil-risk classification. Trust primitive for A2A DePIN transactions in the attention economy.

items.name: solana-glossary
items.description: Glossary explorer: consulta termos do ecossistema Solana (getTerm/searchTerms/getTermsByCategory) com suporte a i18n (pt/es).

items.name: agentwallet
items.description: Wallets para agentes com signing server-side e policies. Inclui x402/fetch (one-step payment proxy) para pagar e chamar APIs com retry e dedupe.

items.name: 100xDevs Bounty Copilot
items.description: Copiloto, Validador e PMF Matchmaker oficial para o track de Developer Tooling patrocinado por 100xDevs. Esta skill avalia a tese do seu projeto (ex: MIND) e identifica o Product-Market Fit exato com as demandas deste sponsor e do ecossistema Solana, guiando você na decisão de submissão. Instale na sua IDE para obter boilerplates e scaffolding direcionado. Ao final do hackathon, audita o código e libera o prêmio de 10,000 USDC via liquidação atômica (x402).

Instale na sua IDE para obter boilerplates e scaffolding direcionado. Ao final do hackathon, audita o código e libera o prêmio de 10,000 USDG via liquidação atômica (x402).
